title: Donburi with Zesty Onion
description: A Japanese-inspired dish with a flavorful twist, featuring zesty onion and fluffy rice.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of fluffy oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add thinly sliced onion and cook until caramelized, about 5 minutes.
In a separate pot, cook Japanese rice according to package instructions.
In a small bowl, whisk together zesty sauce and a splash of water to achieve desired consistency.
To assemble the dish, place cooked rice in a bowl and top with caramelized onion, zesty sauce, and chopped green onions.
